creator: mirya@zoc.com.ua
text:
Can someone reopen the bug? Sorry for such a delay, the problem is
still here (RELEASE-7.0, all ports are up to date), here's the
backtrace with the debugging symbols:

As for 2.8.4_3 vs. 2.8.4_4: I've upgraded from an earlier version (but
can't say exactly which one), also that was done along with the base
system upgrade (6.2 -> 7.0), so it's hard to track it back.
